Name: TXU Solar Buyback Match (1:1 Energy)
Comment: Best-in-class for Oncor. 1:1 credit on energy, but TDU fees apply to all imports.

Name: Reliant Solar Payback Match (Wholesale)
Comment: Credits exports at Real-Time Wholesale (RTW) rates. 3.0c is the historical average.

Name: Gexa Solar Export Saver
Comment: Low import rate. Good for homes with high night usage or smaller solar arrays.

Name: Chariot GreenVolt (Fixed High)
Comment: High fixed base fee, but a strong 7c fixed export credit.

Name: Almika 60 Energy Plus
Comment: Highest fixed export rate (10c) currently available, requires a 5-year commitment.

Name: Tesla TE Fixed (Battery Required)
Comment: Requires Powerwall. Consistent rates for solar-plus-storage owners.

Name: Pulse Power 100% Solar Buyback
Comment: True 1:1 energy match, but with a significantly higher base energy rate.
